news.title: Rs 1,839 crore Biocon block deal: ICICI Pru MF biggest buyer along with Citi and Goldman Sachs
news.description: Mylan sold a ₹1,839 crore stake in Biocon through a block deal, attracting strong institutional demand. ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund emerged as the largest buyer, alongside other mutual funds, insurers and foreign investors, highlighting continued confidence in the pharmaceutical company.

news.title: US stocks today: S&P 500 and Nasdaq open higher as CPI, bank earnings take focus
news.description: US markets opened mixed as softer inflation data boosted expectations of a less aggressive Federal Reserve. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq gained, supported by rate cut hopes, while the Dow declined. Investors also tracked major bank earnings, balancing optimism on inflation with caution around corporat

news.title: Infosys, Wipro ADRs crash up to 7% as IBM warning sends ripples across IT sector
news.description: Infosys and Wipro ADRs fell after IBM forecast weaker-than-expected quarterly revenue, signalling enterprise spending is shifting from software to AI infrastructure. The warning heightened concerns over discretionary technology budgets, deal delays and growth prospects for Indian IT companies.

news.title: Dow Jones Climbs 149 Points to 52,637 as SK Hynix Nasdaq Debut Sparks Chip Rally Amid Oil Surge
news.description: The Dow Jones rose 149.60 points, driven by AI stock enthusiasm and SK Hynix's successful Nasdaq debut, despite geopolitical tensions affecting oil prices. Broader market gains were observed across sectors.
